name: aiep-filesystem
description: Read-scoped filesystem access to AIEP Work Order files, reviewer artifacts under .aiep/artifacts/, and AI Engineering Library assets (prompts, skills, knowledge). Lets reviewers and knowledge tasks read exactly the files they need without broad disk access.

resources.name: wo-artifacts
resources.description: Reviewer artifacts for a Work Order (claude-self-review.md, deepseek-review.md, qwen-review.md, gemini-review.md, codex-audit.md, review-summary.md, decision.json).

resources.name: library-assets
resources.description: Read-only access to the AI Engineering Library sections: prompts, skills, mcp, knowledge.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a permitted file by path.

tools.name: list_dir
tools.description: List entries within a permitted directory.

notes: REFERENCE DESCRIPTOR ONLY. Illustrative shape for integrating an MCP filesystem server with AIEP reviewers/knowledge. Not a shipped v1.0 runtime component. Access is least-privilege and read-only; credential-bearing paths are denied per the secret-hygiene skill.
